notes: Coverage recomputed during reconciliation (RV-002, RV-003) using only direct trace links from links.json. Previous coverage of 93% was inflated by assuming module-level traces cascade to all child items. Direct-link coverage is 46/111 = 41% at the atomic level. Effective coverage including module-level cascade (5 traced modules implicitly covering their children) is approximately 65%. Orphan targets listed are items with no direct trace link. To improve, add explicit trace links for orphan features and requirements, or document the module-cascade coverage methodology explicitly.
